html:
Exclusive to:

“ Improves vision in a storm.

Will help locate mysterious holograms.”

-

The Astroggles is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It requires 2 Moon Shards and 1 Potato to craft. A Sewing Kit repairs 100% of its durability. The Blueprint required to craft the Astroggles is given to players by Wagstaff the first time they enter a Moonstorm. The Blueprint can also be crafted at the Notional Fabricator on the Hermit Island.

When worn in a Sandstorm or Moonstorm, Astroggles prevent movement slowdown and significantly reduce the visual obstruction effects. Additionally, they provide a directional indicator pointing to Wagstaff's location if he is nearby, similar to player indicators (works not only in Moonstorm).

After Celestial Scion is defeated, Wagstaff will no longer appear in Moonstorm. Instead, wearing Astroggles can show the direction of Unrestrained Static.

Astroggles' durability is restored by 10% whenever a Moongleam zaps it, whether the item is on the ground, in the player's inventory, or being worn.

After the Shadow Rift is enabled in Caves, wearing Astroggles in Miasma can prevent slowdown but does not stop damage.

Tips

  • Due to its relatively low durability, it may be desirable for a player to bring two Astroggles and switch them out periodically, as being shocked by a Moongleam restores the durability of all Astroggles in a player's inventory.
    • Players can wear Rain Coat to prevent the zapping damage from Moongleams, or wear Armor to reduce it.
  • Alternatively, since Desert Goggles has 10x longer durability, the player can use Astroggles to find Wagstaff and switch to Desert Goggles to do the task.

Trivia

  • The Astroggles was introduced in the Eye of the Storm update.

Gallery

  • Astroggles Equipped
  • Astroggles Concept Art from Rhymes With Play #280.
  • Astroggles Concept Art from Rhymes With Play #280.

plainText:
Exclusive to:
Astroggles
"Utilize potato eyes to see through storms."
Object Info
Perk
Lets players see through Moonstorms and Sandstorms.
Shows the location of Wagstaff in the Moonstorm.
+3.33/min
Equipable
1 day.
Repaired By Sewing
Does not stack
Protection
20% resistance
Crafting
×2 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"moonstorm_goggleshat"
“Of course! Combining moon energy with potato energy, why didn't I think of that?”
–Wilson
“At least I'll be wearing it in the storm where nobody can see me.”
–Willow
“Is fueled by potato, like Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“I shall be able to see with eyes unclouded.”
–Wendy
“HE DOES DESIGN EXCELLENT MACHINES”
–WX-78
“A rather eccentric design, yet surprisingly effective.”
–Wickerbottom
“If it works, I'm not gonna complain.”
–Woodie
“There are hardly enough inventors brave enough to harness the power of potatoes.”
–Maxwell
“Nö mere störm can stöp me!”
–Wigfrid
“Will these goggles be able to protect all of our eyes from the storm?”
–Webber
“Mon dieu, I can think of much better uses for a potato.”
–Warly
“Belly stuff... for head?”
–Wormwood
“You work with the materials you've got out here.”
–Winona
“What a lune-y invention, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Grrr, can't get the 'tato out!”
–Wurt
“It's important to have the proper equipment in a storm.”
–Walter
“Thankfully it's been designed with room for glasses underneath.”
–Wanda
“ Improves vision in a storm.
Will help locate mysterious holograms.”
-
The Astroggles is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It requires 2 Moon Shards and 1 Potato to craft. A Sewing Kit repairs 100% of its durability. The Blueprint required to craft the Astroggles is given to players by Wagstaff the first time they enter a Moonstorm. The Blueprint can also be crafted at the Notional Fabricator on the Hermit Island.
When worn in a Sandstorm or Moonstorm, Astroggles prevent movement slowdown and significantly reduce the visual obstruction effects. Additionally, they provide a directional indicator pointing to Wagstaff's location if he is nearby, similar to player indicators (works not only in Moonstorm).
After Celestial Scion is defeated, Wagstaff will no longer appear in Moonstorm. Instead, wearing Astroggles can show the direction of Unrestrained Static.
Astroggles' durability is restored by 10% whenever a Moongleam zaps it, whether the item is on the ground, in the player's inventory, or being worn.
After the Shadow Rift is enabled in Caves, wearing Astroggles in Miasma can prevent slowdown but does not stop damage.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Due to its relatively low durability, it may be desirable for a player to bring two Astroggles and switch them out periodically, as being shocked by a Moongleam restores the durability of all Astroggles in a player's inventory.
Players can wear Rain Coat to prevent the zapping damage from Moongleams, or wear Armor to reduce it.
Alternatively, since Desert Goggles has 10x longer durability, the player can use Astroggles to find Wagstaff and switch to Desert Goggles to do the task.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Astroggles was introduced in the Eye of the Storm update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Astroggles là một vật phẩm chế tạo độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó cần 2 Mảnh Trăng và 1 Khoai Tây để chế tạo. Bộ May vá sửa chữa 100% độ bền của nó. Bản thiết kế cần thiết để chế tạo Astroggles được Wagstaff trao cho người chơi khi họ lần đầu tiên bước vào Bão mặt trăng. Bản thiết kế cũng có thể được chế tạo tại Nhà chế tạo giả tưởng trên Đảo Hermit.

It requires 2 [[Moon Shard]]s and 1 [[Potato]] to craft. A [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 100% of its durability. The [[Blueprint]] required to craft the Astroggles is given to players by [[Grainy Transmission|Wagstaff]] the first time they enter a [[Moonstorm]]. The Blueprint can also be crafted at the [[Notional Fabricator]] on the [[Hermit Island]]. When worn in a [[Sandstorm]] or Moonstorm, Astroggles prevent movement slowdown and significantly reduce the visual obstruction effects. Additionally, they provide a directional indicator pointing to Wagstaff's location if he is nearby, similar to player indicators (works not only in Moonstorm). After [[Celestial Scion]] is defeated, Wagstaff will no longer appear in Moonstorm. Instead, wearing Astroggles can show the direction of [[Unrestrained Static]]. Astroggles' durability is restored by 10% whenever a [[Moongleam]] zaps it, whether the item is on the ground, in the player's inventory, or being worn. After the [[Shadow Rift]] is enabled in Caves, wearing Astroggles in [[Miasma]] can prevent slowdown but does not stop damage. == {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * Due to its relatively low durability, it may be desirable for a player to bring two Astroggles and switch them out periodically, as being shocked by a Moongleam restores the durability of ''all'' Astroggles in a player's inventory. ** Players can wear [[Rain Coat]] to prevent the zapping damage from Moongleams, or wear [[Armor/DST|Armor]] to reduce it. * Alternatively, since [[Desert Goggles]] has 10x longer durability, the player can use Astroggles to find Wagstaff and switch to Desert Goggles to do the task. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Astroggles was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Eye of the Storm|Eye of the Storm]]'' update. == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Astroggles_Equipped.png|Astroggles Equipped RWP280 Astroggles Concept Art1.png|Astroggles Concept Art from ''Rhymes With Play'' #280.
